title: Story Mode Style ( description )
description: make you game look like minecraft story mode 👀👀
body:
( Temporarily stopped development )




# **Require**   ![re](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec492fe5e99d9f4d0da63da4daf4ff73ff51106b.png)

- [EMF](https://modrinth.com/project/4I1XuqiY)
- [ETF](https://modrinth.com/project/BVzZfTc1)
- [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/project/50dA9Sha)
- [Fresh Programmer Animations](https://modrinth.com/project/iDUHM8rt)
- [MoreMcmeta Emissive Textures](https://modrinth.com/project/oQ0dIGZg)



![Story Require](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dde20b47f5daf531879ed3983de51e504999955f.png)


> this resources pack make you game look like _**minecraft story mode**_
> 
> change model & texture


<details>
<summary>Mobs list:</summary>

- zombie
- skeleton
- stray
- enderman
- creeper
- spider
- cave spider
- witch
- ghast
- Zombified Piglin
- cow
- mooshroom
- chicken
- parrot
- squid
- cod
- salmon
- pufferfish
- tropical fish
- villager
- iron golem
- bat

</details>


<details>
<summary>block list:</summary>

- enchanting table
- furnace
- chest
- ender chest
- bookshelf
- crafting table
- stone
- grass block
- dirt block
- dispenser
- dropper
- carved pumpkin
- jack o lantern
- command block

</details>




# You should download [Storify](https://modrinth.com/project/K37jGc07) to complete our resourcepack!!!!
